artifacts.description: Reproducible Excel model with embedded formulas, row-level packet citations, scenario ROI, and sensitivity check flags
Concise expert memo with assumptions, validation checks, 5% sensitivity notes, and final action mapping

notes: Computed under explicit equal-weight assumption because weights were not supplied in packet.
payback_days mapped to risk exposure by inversion to a margin score before weighting.
All feasible combinations under budget were evaluated against 5% sensitivity; no class flips observed.
residual ambiguity tracked as needs_review in workbook/runbook.
